rootCause: Process.svelte only resolved process metadata from built-in JSON and dereferenced undefined when ManageProcesses listed custom processes, crashing the Astro preview server and causing Playwright navigation to /processes to fail with net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED.
resolution: Pass full process data to Process.svelte, guard against missing metadata, treat custom processes as read-only, and add unit coverage so rendering custom entries no longer throws during E2E runs.
